title: Pedestrian hit and killed on N2 near Power Town
description: LITTLE BRAK NEWS - Police have confirmed...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"Breaking News\n Video","html":"Breaking News\n Video"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"LITTLE BRAK NEWS - Police have confirmed that a pedestrian (32) has been hit and killed on the N2 near Power Town, Little Brak River this evening.","html":"LITTLE BRAK NEWS - Police have confirmed that a pedestrian (32) has been hit and killed on the N2 near Power Town, Little Brak River this evening."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The incident took place around 18:50.","html":"The incident took place around 18:50."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"A preliminary investigation indicates that the vehicle was travelling in the direction of Great Brak River when the man was hit. Circumstances surrounding the incident are not yet known.","html":"A preliminary investigation indicates that the vehicle was travelling in the direction of Great Brak River when the man was hit. Circumstances surrounding the incident are not yet known."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Mossel Bay Advertiser will update its readers as more information is released."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Advertiser recently reported on a 10-year-old girl from Power Town who was also hit by a vehicle while walking on the N2 in July.","html":"The Advertiser recently reported on a 10-year-old girl from Power Town who was also hit by a vehicle while walking on the N2 in July."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Watch a video of the  accident scene below:","html":"Watch a video of the accident scene below:"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Your browser does not support HTML5 video.","html":""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
